summary: Phase 2 (PWA) and Phase 3 (MR Reports) testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verification shows all features working correctly. Phase 1 (MR Order Form) was already tested in iteration_29 with 100% pass rate.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 phases of MR module enhancement tested successfully. Phase 1 (MR Order Form) tested in iteration_29. Phase 2 (PWA) verified: /mr-manifest.json with start_url=/mrvet/dashboard and scope=/mrvet/, /mr-sw.js service worker with caching strategies, service worker registration confirmed via console log '[MR-PWA] Service worker registered'. Phase 3 (MR Reports) verified: GET /api/mr-reports returns summary, mr_stats, visits, orders; frontend page at /admin/mr-reports shows 7 summary cards, 3 tabs (MR Overview, Visit Log, Orders), MR filter dropdown, date range filter. Key data-testid attributes: mr-reports-page, mr-reports-tab-overview, mr-reports-tab-visits, mr-reports-tab-orders, mr-reports-filter-mr, mr-reports-date-from, mr-reports-date-to, mr-reports-apply-btn.

features_tested.Phase 2 - Service Worker (/mr-sw.js): PASS - Contains caching strategies (networkFirst, cacheFirst), install/activate/fetch handlers
features_tested.Phase 2 - Service Worker Registration: PASS - Console log '[MR-PWA] Service worker registered' confirmed on MR dashboard
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports API: PASS - GET /api/mr-reports returns summary, mr_stats, visits, orders, total
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports Summary Fields: PASS - total_mrs, active_mrs, total_visits, today_visits, total_orders, pending_orders, states_covered
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports MR Stats Structure: PASS - id, name, status, total_visits, today_visits, pending_followups, total_orders, cancelled_orders, outcomes
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports Summary Cards: PASS - All 7 cards visible (Total MRs, Active MRs, Total Visits, Today's Visits, Total Orders, Pending Orders, States)
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports MR Overview Tab: PASS - Shows per-MR stats with outcome badges (Interested, Order Placed, Follow-up)
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports Visit Log Tab: PASS - Shows visit entries with mr_name, entity_name, outcome, visit_date
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports Orders Tab: PASS - Shows order_number, status badges, Cancel Req badges, MR attribution
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports MR Filter Dropdown: PASS - Shows All MRs and individual MR names
features_tested.Phase 3 - MR Reports Date Range Filter: PASS - From/To date inputs and Apply button work

api_tests_passed: GET /mr-manifest.json - PWA manifest accessible with correct start_url and scope
GET /mr-sw.js - Service worker accessible with caching strategies
GET /api/mr-reports - summary contains total_mrs, active_mrs, total_visits, today_visits, total_orders, pending_orders, states_covered
GET /api/mr-reports - mr_stats array with per-MR performance data
GET /api/mr-reports - visits array with mr_name, outcome fields
GET /api/mr-reports - orders array with order_number, status fields
GET /api/mr-reports?mr_id=xxx - Filter by MR ID works
